productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Cress 3sswptch Grey Track Pants
description: Composition Full length dark grey track pants made of 60% cotton, 40% polyster, adidas's signature three stripes along the sides in shades of pink, handy side pockets, comfortable elastic waist band with inner drawstring, and brand name and logo embroidered on the left leg Fitting Regular Washcare Machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 Degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on prints/trims/logo If you want to look stylish as you work out in the gym, or go for a walk or jog in the park, these dark grey track pants from adidas belong in your wardrobe. The stripes on the sides add instant spunk to the pants. The side pockets are spacious enough for everything from your wallet to iPod. The fabric is breathable, and the waist band is soft for a more snug Fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Team it up with a cool t-shirt and an excellent pair of shoes to hit the road. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
